violations.description: General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of nonfood contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. Observed shelving in storage area that had cardboard boxes as liners.

Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Floors, walls, and/or ceiling were not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent, and easily cleanable. Observed ceiling tiles in kitchen area that is not smooth or easily cleanable.
Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory was used for purpose other than handwashing. -Observed containers and cutlery in hand sink. Hand sinks must only be used for hand washing.

Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Floors, walls, and/or ceiling were not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent, and easily cleanable. -Ceiling in food prep area is textured sheetrock, which is neither smooth, nor cleanable.
Number, location, accessibility, soap and paper towels provided (3 pts deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Clean/dry location, protected, covered, original containers, labeled (2 pts deducted)
Clean, proper use, storage, sanitizing solution (2 pts deducted)
